focus: BM25 baselines across all 15 public BEIR datasets (all tiers); lexical technique matrix groundwork (rerankers ported, pool caching generalized, failure map); embedding-pipeline input prep.
reason_started: Continue M-0002.2 after M-0002.1; operator direction to proceed through the tiers.
reason_ended: All 15 public BEIR datasets baselined and reconciled against published numbers; FEVER-family discrepancy investigated and operator-approved (ADL-0005).
key_findings: Aggregate BM25 nDCG@10 0.4261 across 15 public BEIR datasets, on the published ~0.43 average; 13/15 within +/-9%.
FEVER-family (FEVER, Climate-FEVER) ~13% low - localized config discrepancy, documented and accepted (ADL-0005).

Both Phase 1 lexical rerankers (coverage, refined PRF) classify domain-conditional, not universal: wins cluster on scientific/medical text; PRF hurts financial (FiQA) and argument (ArguAna) retrieval.
Cross-domain failure map: three regimes - vocabulary mismatch (web/forum), ranking noise (science/duplicate-question), broad many-answer (deeply-judged corpora).
reusable_lessons: LES-011 published numbers as harness oracle
LES-013/014 no racing pipelines / verify by parent PID
LES-015 harden sibling remote-call paths symmetrically
loc_note: Harness generalization + 15-dataset evidence; growth is new cross-domain capability, not duplication.
evidence_quality_notes: Live full-corpus evaluation with verified doc counts; the one lost FEVER run was re-run after path hardening and its index count verified (5,416,568) before acceptance.
